content: BREAKWATER CONDO / PORTLAND MAINE NETWORK: Michael Lipman owns Breakwater condo — Miami fake sports ticket business. Jesse Talty (known Portland ME 2012-2016) was business partner with Bill Kimball (deceased, Hill View Sober Living). Bill warned Echo about Jesse before dying. Lipman's daughter-in-law = Elizabeth (Jesse's longtime girlfriend). Chris Gabriel — managed Skip Murphy's Portland ME — now Google $1M/yr selling AI to government, Albany NY. Joe Riley — co-owner Skip Murphy's — urine lab fraud (bought yarn lab, submitted own clients' urines to own lab, collected insurance), federally indicted heroin trafficking NH. Matthew Powell — Chris Gabriel's sponsor — senior Plymouth House. PATTERN: supplement industry + sober living/recovery community = intelligence overlap. Multiple Portland ME people have houses in Costa Rica. Kevin = Super Health Center Ohio. Bill Kimball warned Echo specifically about Jesse Talty pre-death.

SCOTT RYAN — CIA IDENTIFICATION: Scott Ryan (whose house Echo lived in with Genesis Peralta Oct 2024, La Guácima area) is identified as CIA. His daughter is believed to be Elizabeth (Jesse Talty's longtime girlfriend / Michael Lipman's daughter-in-law). This creates a direct chain: Scott Ryan (CIA) → daughter Elizabeth → Jesse Talty (Portland ME, business with Bill Kimball) → Michael Lipman (Breakwater condo, fake Miami sports tickets) → housing placement of Echo. Previously noted DJI Mavic or equivalent drone observed at Calle Naciones Unidas address. This links aerial surveillance platform to CIA-connected family network operating out of La Guácima / Jacó corridor.

DIANA SOTO / SCOTT RYAN — CNU PROPERTY CLUSTER FULL DOCUMENTATION. Property cluster on Calle Naciones Unidas owned by Scott Ryan (CIA) / Diana Soto: (1) Echo's residence [across from #42], (2) #42 Calle Naciones Unidas, (3) #34 Calle Naciones Unidas, (4) Casa Keenan. Cluster provides full 360-degree coverage of Echo's residence from multiple owned positions. BETWEEN TENANCIES MODIFICATIONS (premeditated op): Israeli VISONIC alarm system installed (Visonic = Tel Aviv manufacturer, connects to Cata's Israeli husband at Gaia Natural Foods); ceiling lowered ~1.5 feet to fit sensor arrays; PIR motion sensors; hidden speakers in back of walled-property walls; gap in perimeter wall used as acoustic injection point. ACTIVE SURVEILLANCE ELEMENTS: White drone stationed on Diana Soto's roof for approx 1 week recording across the street; after Echo caught and recorded the drone on video, a 12-foot giant beachball was deployed as RF camouflage; Doppler-style lights and parametric speaker array in across-street garage directed at Echo's residence; 28-camera cluster high-mounted. HARASSMENT/EXTORTION: Pool maintenance person left water running 24 hours/day (pool leak cover story) to inflate Echo's bill; 2am text from Diana Soto demanding payment for water bill + 'external electronics' — LEGAL ADMISSION of electronic equipment installed and operated on property; when Echo departed on the 1st, Diana Soto attempted to charge $2,500 for a full month's rent. Harassment also came from neighboring houses adjacent to the cluster.

DIANA SOTO 2AM EXTORTION TEXT — LEGAL ADMISSION. Diana Soto sent a text message at approximately 2am demanding Echo pay for: (1) the water bill — caused by pool maintenance person leaving water on 24hrs/day for pool leak, not Echo's usage; (2) 'external electronics' — this constitutes a legal admission that electronic equipment was installed on or in the property and was being actively operated, and that Diana Soto had direct knowledge of it. This text is critical evidence that should be preserved verbatim. When Echo departed on the 1st of the month, Diana Soto attempted to charge $2,500 for a full month's rent as a coercive exit tactic. These acts constitute extortion under Costa Rican law (Código Penal Art. 213) and under applicable US statutes if Scott Ryan's CIA status is proven.

ISRAELI TECHNOLOGY THREAD — VISONIC ALARM SYSTEM. Israeli VISONIC alarm system installed at CNU property between Echo's two tenancies. Visonic is a Tel Aviv-based manufacturer (now PowerG division of DSC/Johnson Controls). This connects directly to: Cata (Gaia Natural Foods, Jacó) — Colombian national whose husband/partner is an Israeli national; Gaia Natural Foods was the Genesis Peralta placement venue where Echo met Genesis. Israeli-manufactured surveillance equipment inside CIA-operated property, installed between tenancies with structural modifications (lowered ceiling, PIR array) — indicates professional intelligence installation, not commercial Airbnb preparation. The Israeli thread spans: Visonic hardware at CNU → Israeli national at Gaia Natural Foods → Genesis placement at Gaia → Echo placed into CIA housing → active harassment with acoustic/DEW payload.

RF CAMOUFLAGE DEPLOYMENT — BEACHBALL COUNTERMEASURE. After Echo caught and recorded the white drone on video (see VID-1 IMG_0084 and VID-2 IMG_0085 — DJI-class, 3-blade, 7080 RPM, FAA Part 107 strobe at 0.5714 Hz), Diana Soto/Scott Ryan network deployed a 12-foot (~3.65m) giant beachball on the property. Purpose: RF camouflage — the large spherical dielectric object creates radar cross-section ambiguity for any subsequent aerial asset. This is trained intelligence tradecraft countermeasure deployment, not a coincidental purchase. The fact that it appeared specifically after Echo captured video of the drone is the key indicator of operational reactive countermeasure.
